case_title: PARADISE ENTERPRISES, LTD., VS. LANCE DALTON

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARADISE ENTERPRISES, LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DALTON, LANCE $9,879.50 PRINCIPAL, $477.09 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,509.89, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
